h1.visual_description: Large, bold, all-caps, sans-serif font, followed by a full-width horizontal rule.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, all-caps, sans-serif font, blue color, used for major section groupings within the document structure.

h3.visual_description: Standard-sized, mixed-case, sans-serif font, blue color (hyperlinked), used for individual chapters, experiments, or front/back matter sections.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Right-aligned page number (Roman or Arabic numerals)

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX ($...$ for inline, $$...$$ for block equations)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric (implied by 'References' section in technical manual context)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: No recurring header/footer noise identified on this page; content is centered with generous white space.
